summary: Frontend testing of 5 features completed successfully: Module permissions filtering, Server config dialog, User management features, Invoice date column, and Logo visibility. All features verified working.

frontend_flows: Homepage loads with CIA logo visible
Super Admin Dashboard loaded with 'Config. Servidor' button visible
Server Configuration dialog opens with correct fields (DB URL, DB Name, Cloud Provider, Backup config)
Company login page at /empresa/cia-servicios-demo-sa-de-cv/login - Logo visible
Company dashboard shows logo in sidebar header
Settings page loaded with user management table
User detail dialog opens with Eye button - shows ID, Role, Name, Email, Phone, Password fields, toggle status button
User toggle status buttons (UserX/UserCheck) visible in user table
Invoices page loaded with 'Fecha Factura' column in table header
Invoice table displays invoice dates correctly (9 mar 2026, 10 mar 2026, etc.)
New Invoice dialog has 'Fecha de Factura' required field
Restricted user sees only 3 modules: Dashboard, Proyectos, Facturación
All restricted modules correctly hidden: CRM, Cotizaciones, Compras, Proveedores, Documentos, Reportes de Campo, Indicadores, Inteligencia IA, Configuración

module_permissions_filtering.result: Sidebar correctly filters modules based on user.module_permissions

server_configuration_dialog.ui: Dialog titled 'Configuración del Servidor de Bases de Datos' with all required fields

features.view_details: Eye button opens dialog with ID, Role, password display, editable fields
features.edit_info: Dialog allows editing Name, Email, Phone, and setting new password
features.toggle_status: UserX/UserCheck buttons toggle user is_active status (Inhabilitar/Habilitar)

invoice_date_column.new_invoice_dialog: Contains 'Fecha de Factura *' required field with date picker

locations_verified: Company login page - Logo visible above company name
Sidebar header - Logo visible next to 'CIA SERVICIOS'
logo_visibility.implementation: Logo loaded from LOGO_URL constant or company.logo_file (base64)

success_rate.backend: Not tested (per request - frontend only testing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features verified working: 1) Module permissions filtering in sidebar works correctly - restricted user sees only allowed modules (dashboard, projects, invoices). 2) Server config dialog in Super Admin portal has fields for DB URL, DB Name, Cloud Provider, Backup settings. 3) User management in Settings has view/edit details dialog, toggle status functionality with UserX/UserCheck buttons. 4) Invoices table has 'Fecha Factura' column and New Invoice dialog has date picker field. 5) Logo visible on company login page and sidebar header.
